strengths: Exceptional walkability (10/10) with dense pedestrian infrastructure on NW 23rd Avenue
Outstanding healthcare access — Walgreens at 38m, 6 facilities within 1km
Excellent transit access — Portland Streetcar and TriMet bus stops within 400m
Vibrant NW 23rd Avenue shopping corridor with 16 independent retail shops
Rich cafe culture with 14 cafes including Case Study Coffee
Diverse international dining — Thai, Burmese, Indian, Italian, Vietnamese cuisines
areas_for_improvement: Education — only 2 schools within 1km; elementary options limited
Parks — only 3 small playgrounds; no full-size parks
Entertainment — no cinemas, theaters, or music venues within 1km
